label: Brave Search
description: Query Brave's independent web search index via API key for privacy-respecting search results.

form.title: Connect Brave Search
form.subtitle: Paste your Brave Search API key to start querying the independent web index.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste an API key from your Brave Search subscription. Takes 30 seconds — no OAuth flow, no extra setup.
methods.how_to:
## Get a Brave Search API Key

1. Go to [api.search.brave.com](https://api.search.brave.com) and sign in (or create a Brave account).
2. Navigate to **Subscriptions** in the left sidebar.
3. Pick a plan — a **Free** tier is available with 2,000 queries/month.
4. After subscribing, open the **API Keys** tab on the same page.
5. Click **Generate API Key**. Copy the key shown (it will only be displayed once — save it somewhere safe).
6. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below and click **Connect**.

## Notes

- Keys are tied to a subscription plan. If you exceed your monthly quota, requests will return a `429` error until the cycle resets or you upgrade.
- To rotate a key, generate a new one in the portal and re-paste it here.
- Country/language filtering is configured per-request, not at the key level.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at api.search.brave.com → Subscriptions → API Keys. Shown once at generation time.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Override only if Brave issues a regional or versioned endpoint. Leave blank to use the default.
